course: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)
skills:

- Describe the fundamentals of Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) and their applications in processing sequential data. _x000D_
- Implement RNNs using PyTorch for tasks like sequence classification, employing architectures like Long short-term memory (LSTM).

course: Kickstart Your E-commerce Retail Store
skills:
This course is targeted at the retail industry and aims to equip learners with the new way of selling using E-Commerce on Shopify. Currently, retail companies must constantly innovate to make the transition to e-commerce. Marketers are implementing new e-commerce strategies. The COVID-19 situation has highlighted the importance of retail companies moving into the online realm._x000D_
According to information from https://wearesocial.com/sg/digital-2020-singapore, 89% of Singapore internet users (regardless of device) have visited an online retail store. Such a high figure indicates that online retailing is in high demand._x000D_
This course aims to train new learners about E-Commerce strategies by establishing an E-Commerce store using Shopify, understanding the user requirements and guidelines for establishing an E-Commerce store, determining online store marketing metrics, and developing a plan to improve technical and user experience.

course: Audio Post-production and Foley Arts
skills:
Audio Post-production and Foley Arts introduces students to conceptual, aesthetic and philosophical approaches to audio production for film, games, and other forms of visual media. The module covers practical industry skills including Foley for picture, location sound recording, and audio post production. Students are provided with opportunities to hone their audio production skills and develop a greater appreciation for the role that sound plays in visual media. Students are required to use industry equipment such as wired and wireless microphones, field-mixers, field-recorders, digital audio workstations, and other professional audio devices. Students will learn to apply these skills to produce and capture Foley, sound effects (SFX), soundtracks, ambient, sounds and dialogue for a wide range of media.  _x000D_
 _x000D_
Key topics in this module area: _x000D_
Functions of sound for visual media _x000D_
Location sound production _x000D_
Audio post production and Foley for film

course: Business Brand Building on TikTok using Video Marketing
skills:
This course is designed for any retail business and train learners on how to build a brand on TikTok. Every year, the demand for businesses to become more social grows. Despite having a social media presence, businesses are finding it increasingly difficult to stay visible and in the minds of their target audience. As a result, more businesses are turning to social media to increase brand awareness, resulting in increased traffic and conversion._x000D_
_x000D_
Such training is necessary because social media has become an essential component of every marketing strategy, with the benefits of using social media including increased traffic and sales at a low cost. In today's business, social media marketing is a low-cost resource. As a result, social media marketing has become an important component of marketing success, and many marketers see the platform as a potential source of business growth. Some of these professionals, however, are unsure of which strategies to employ in order to be effective._x000D_
_x000D_
We observed Singaporeans spent an average of 16.3 hours per month on TikTok with 74% increase year on year change (https://wearesocial.com/sg/blog/2022/02/digital-2022/). This shows that TikTok is an upcoming platform and very suitable for businesses to use to build their brand._x000D_
